concerns.text: The plan explicitly rejects the spec's required datasets (Google 10000 English, Enron Corpus) because they are missing from the 'Verified datasets' block, opting instead for a 'deterministic synthetic dataset generator'. While this avoids URL invention, it fundamentally alters the research question. The spec (US-2) asks to benchmark against 'Enron Email Corpus and Google 10000 English words'. Synthetic strings do not possess the semantic distribution, length variance, or collision characteristics of real-world text corpora. The plan must either locate the correct real-world datasets (if they exist in the verified block under different names) or explicitly amend the research question to 'Synthetic Data Performance' rather than claiming to evaluate performance on the specified corpora.
